overall.description: Game engine footage from GTA V showing a first-person perspective walking along a winding coastal highway. The scene features a sunny day with clear skies, moderate traffic with various vehicles passing by, rocky cliffs, lush green trees, and modern residential architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding coastal highway shoulder with ocean views

events.description: black SUV drives uphill past the camera on the road
silver sedan passes by heading uphill on the highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt shoulder of the coastal highway, moving uphill with the ocean visible to the right

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving uphill on the coastal highway

entered.detail: asphalt road with double yellow lines winding along the coastline
tan rocky hillside with sparse vegetation rising above the road
tall green trees with white bark lining the right side of the road
blue ocean visible through gaps in the trees on the right
wooden power pole with electrical wires running parallel to the road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny coastal highway with the camera walking along the dirt shoulder. The road winds through a landscape of rocky cliffs on the left and eucalyptus trees on the right, with glimpses of the blue ocean visible through the foliage. Vehicles including a black SUV pass by on the road as the camera moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway intersection with modern residential house

events.description: approaching modern white house with yellow wall, ocean view disappears behind trees
green tractor with yellow wheels drives past on the road

agents.ego_description: continuing along the shoulder, passing the entrance to a modern house with a yellow brick wall

notable_agents.action: green tractor with large wheels driving uphill on the highway

entered.detail: contemporary white building with flat roof and clean architectural lines
curved low wall with yellow bricks surrounding the house entrance
tall palm tree near the driveway entrance
overhead street lamp suspended from the utility pole

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a residential area where a modern white house with a distinctive yellow brick wall appears on the right. The ocean view becomes obscured by the house and denser vegetation. A green tractor passes by on the road, and the camera continues along the shoulder past the house entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon highway with guardrail protection

events.description: terrain becomes rockier with steep cliff face closing in on the left side
white SUV and jeep pass by on the road

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrowing shoulder next to steep rocky cliffs, passing a tractor and approaching a guardrail section

notable_agents.action: white SUV driving uphill along the winding road

entered.detail: white wooden guardrail installed along the edge of the steep cliff
tree with vibrant purple blossoms visible on the distant hillside
rocky hillside with sparse bushes and dry vegetation

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to a more enclosed rocky canyon as the road cuts through steep terrain. A white guardrail appears on the left for protection along the cliff edge. The modern house disappears behind as the camera moves deeper into the winding mountain road, with a purple jacaranda tree visible in the distance and moderate traffic passing by.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain road with steep rock faces

events.description: red car and black jeep pass by in quick succession on the road
road curves sharply to the left around the rocky cliff face

agents.ego_description: navigating the leftward curve of the road as it winds around the rocky cliff face

notable_agents.action: red car driving uphill around the curve
black jeep following the red car uphill

entered.detail: purple flowering lavender bushes growing along the rocky roadside

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through the rocky canyon as the road curves sharply to the left. The white guardrail runs continuously along the steep cliff face while lavender bushes line the right side of the path. Multiple vehicles including a red car and black jeep navigate the winding uphill road as the camera follows the curve of the highway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunny coastal highway that transitions from an open seaside road into a narrow, winding rocky canyon. It begins on a dirt shoulder between rocky cliffs and eucalyptus trees, with the blue ocean visible through the foliage as a black SUV passes by. As the camera moves forward, the scenery shifts toward a residential area featuring a modern white house with a yellow brick wall and a passing green tractor. The environment then tightens into a steep canyon where the house disappears and a white guardrail emerges along the cliff edge, leading the camera past a distant purple jacaranda tree. Finally, the road curves sharply to the left through the rocky terrain, passing lavender bushes and navigating uphill alongside a red car and a black jeep.
